title: Tyberious Institute of Xenobiology

{{Quote|Researchers from the Tyberious Institute of Xenobiology have dredged millennia-old ibliton shells from Randorn's swamps.|Holobrochure for the Tagge Holographic Museum of Chandrila|<ref name="Creatures" />}}
The '''Tyberious Institute of Xenobiology''' was an institute from which a group of researchers at one point visited the celestial body [[Randorn 2]]. There, the [[Xenobiologist/Legends|xenobiologists]] discovered in [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]] [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]]-old shells of the local [[ibliton]] [[Mollusk/Legends|mollusk]]. The researchers were also present during an ibliton's attack on a local [[Mizx]] [[City/Legends|village]], where they defended the locals and eventually [[Death/Legends|killed]] the creature.

==Description==
The Tyberious Institute of Xenobiology was an institution<ref name="Creatures" /> that shared its name with the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim's]] [[Tyberious system/Legends|Tyberious system]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref>

==History==
{{Quote|Meslinger of the Tyberious Institute speaks of an ibliton that pulled a Mizx cottage apart to get at the natives inside.|Holobrochure for the Tagge Holographic Museum of Chandrila|<ref name="Creatures" />}}
[[File:Ibliton-CotG.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Researchers from the Tyberious Institute of Xenobiology encountered an ibliton (pictured) on Randorn 2.]]
Researchers from the [[xenobiology]] institute, including [[Meslinger]], at some point visited<ref name="Creatures" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="EAOC Randorn">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Randorn system/Legends|Randorn system]]</ref> celestial body [[Randorn 2]], which was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to the large, [[Diet/Legends|predatory]] [[ibliton]]<ref name="Creatures" /> [[Mollusk/Legends|mollusk]].<ref name="CSWE ibliton">{{CSWECite|II|74|ibliton}}</ref> There, the [[Xenobiologist/Legends|xenobiologists]] dredged from [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]] ibliton shells that were several [[Millennium/Legends|thousands]] of [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old.<ref name="Creatures" />

At one point, an ibliton attacked a [[City/Legends|village]] of Randorn 2's native [[Mizx]] [[Species/Legends|species]] while the researchers were present. During the incident, Meslinger witnessed the creature demolishing a local cottage in order to reach its inhabitants. Ultimately, the xenobiologists were able to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the ibliton, in the process saving the lives of all but one of the villagers. Meslinger was also later present for the [[Funeral/Legends|funeral]] of the killed Mizx. At some point by the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], an entry of a [[Holo-brochure|holobrochure]] for the [[Tagge Holographic Museum]] of<ref name="Creatures" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE Chandrila">{{CSWECite|I|119|Chandrila}}</ref> [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] dedicated to the ibliton noted the visit of the researchers of the Tyberious Institute of Xenobiology to Randorn 2.<ref name="Creatures" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Tyberious Institute of Xenobiology was created by [[Phil Brucato]] for the [[1994]] sourcebook ''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]'', published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Creatures" />
